properties.COMMENT: 20221108-toms: C. Teabo informed that JB-25574 did not exist (via field visit) and that there is nothing connecting the 42" and 60" pipes. Sean M. recommended an ES be added and a short ditch line connecting the 42" & 60" pipes.

PROPERT OWNER SAYS CITY RAN CAMERA DOWN THIS SEGMENT IN 1995 OR 1996. THERE ARE SINK HOLES AND CRACKS ALL FROM HERE TO 822D.481. PIPE HAS SMALL BRICK WINGWALLS.      PILOT INVENTORY.

ADJOINER SAYS STORM WATER HAS COME OUT OF THE TOP OF DI. BOTTOM HAS 1 FT MUCK AND 2 FT WATER AND MUCK IN BOTTOM. GRATES CRACKED AND PATCHED.      PILOT INVENTORY.
